description.zh-Hans: 应用带有平滑过渡带和带通模式的阈值滤镜。
description.en: Applies a threshold filter with smooth transition band and band-pass mode.

triggers.zh-Hans: 阈值, 二值化, 黑白阈值, 带通, 亮度阈值
triggers.en: threshold, binary, black and white, band pass, luminance threshold

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 对图像应用阈值以创建黑白二值遮罩。
exampleUsage.en: Apply a threshold to an image to create a binary black-and-white mask.
